title: Composition
summary: Evaluates an ordered composition as P_{2I_1} composed with ... composed with P_{2I_r}.

mathematicalContent.heading: Mathematical role
mathematicalContent.body: Evaluates an ordered composition as P_{2I_1} composed with ... composed with P_{2I_r}.

mathematicalContent.heading: Formal boundary
mathematicalContent.body: This page describes exactly the declarations present in Juhlformula/Juhloperators/Composition.lean; claims not represented by a declaration are not counted as verified.

correspondence.mathematicalMeaning: Definition: compose Unary. The exact mathematical type is preserved from the Lean signature shown alongside it.
correspondence.leanType: def composeUnary (P Q : Function Conf → Function Conf) : Function Conf → Function Conf

correspondence.mathematicalMeaning: Formal proposition: compose Unary apply. The exact mathematical type is preserved from the Lean signature shown alongside it.
correspondence.leanType: theorem composeUnary_apply (P Q : Function Conf → Function Conf) (f : Function Conf) : composeUnary P Q f = P (Q f)

correspondence.mathematicalMeaning: Definition: id Unary. The exact mathematical type is preserved from the Lean signature shown alongside it.
correspondence.leanType: def idUnary : Function Conf → Function Conf

correspondence.mathematicalMeaning: Formal proposition: id Unary apply. The exact mathematical type is preserved from the Lean signature shown alongside it.
correspondence.leanType: theorem idUnary_apply (f : Function Conf) : idUnary f = f

correspondence.mathematicalMeaning: Definition: abstract To Unary. The exact mathematical type is preserved from the Lean signature shown alongside it.
correspondence.leanType: def abstractToUnary (P : GJMS.AbstractOperator CalConf) : Function Conf → Function Conf

correspondence.mathematicalMeaning: Formal proposition: abstract To Unary apply. The exact mathematical type is preserved from the Lean signature shown alongside it.
correspondence.leanType: theorem abstractToUnary_apply (P : GJMS.AbstractOperator CalConf) (f : Function Conf) : abstractToUnary CalConf P f = P.toWeightedTangentialOperator.toOperator f

correspondence.mathematicalMeaning: Definition: compose Unary List. The exact mathematical type is preserved from the Lean signature shown alongside it.
correspondence.leanType: def composeUnaryList : List (Function Conf → Function Conf) → Function Conf → Function Conf | [] => idUnary | P :: Ps => composeUnary P (composeUnaryList Ps)

correspondence.mathematicalMeaning: Formal proposition: compose Unary List nil. The exact mathematical type is preserved from the Lean signature shown alongside it.
Formal proposition: compose Unary List cons. The exact mathematical type is preserved from the Lean signature shown alongside it.
correspondence.leanType: theorem composeUnaryList_cons (P : Function Conf → Function Conf) (Ps : List (Function Conf → Function Conf)) : composeUnaryList (Conf

correspondence.mathematicalMeaning: Definition: Abstract GJMSFamily. The exact mathematical type is preserved from the Lean signature shown alongside it.
Definition: operator List Of Composition. The exact mathematical type is preserved from the Lean signature shown alongside it.
correspondence.leanType: def operatorListOfComposition (G : AbstractGJMSFamily CalConf) {N : Nat} (I : Composition N) : List (Function Conf → Function Conf)

correspondence.mathematicalMeaning: Definition: compose GJMS. The exact mathematical type is preserved from the Lean signature shown alongside it.
correspondence.leanType: def composeGJMS (G : AbstractGJMSFamily CalConf) {N : Nat} (I : Composition N) : Function Conf → Function Conf

correspondence.mathematicalMeaning: Formal proposition: operator List singleton. The exact mathematical type is preserved from the Lean signature shown alongside it.
correspondence.leanType: theorem operatorList_singleton (G : AbstractGJMSFamily CalConf) (N : Nat) (hN : 0 < N) : operatorListOfComposition CalConf G (Composition.singleton N hN) = [abstractToUnary CalConf (G N hN)]

correspondence.mathematicalMeaning: Formal proposition: compose GJMS singleton. The exact mathematical type is preserved from the Lean signature shown alongside it.
correspondence.leanType: theorem composeGJMS_singleton (G : AbstractGJMSFamily CalConf) (N : Nat) (hN : 0 < N) : composeGJMS CalConf G (Composition.singleton N hN) = abstractToUnary CalConf (G N hN)

limitations: Verified means that Lean checks the propositions encoded in this file and their imported assumptions. It does not assert that the present formal statement exhausts every analytic hypothesis or convention in the cited literature.
